entities.name: LOW PRESSURE DRIP IRRIGATION
entities.description: An irrigation system promoted in Sub Saharan Africa as an alternative to traditional small scale irrigation for vegetables

entities.name: SUB SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where low pressure drip irrigation is being promoted

entities.name: AFRICAN MARKET GARDEN
entities.description: A horticultural production system for smallholders based on low-pressure drip irrigation and an improved crop management package

entities.name: IMPROVED CROP MANAGEMENT PACKAGE
entities.description: A set of enhanced agricultural practices used to increase crop productivity

entities.name: WATERING CANS
entities.description: A traditional manual irrigation method used for small scale vegetable production

entities.name: IMPROVED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An experimental treatment using watering cans combined with an improved crop management package

entities.name: FARMER PRACTICE
entities.description: An experimental treatment using watering cans and common local vegetable production practices

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output from the vegetable species

entities.name: LABOR
entities.description: The human effort and time required for irrigation and garden maintenance

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The amount of water utilized for the cultivation of vegetables

entities.name: OKRA
entities.description: One of the vegetable species monitored for productivity and resource use

entities.name: EGGPLANT
entities.description: One of the vegetable species monitored for productivity and resource use

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the agricultural experiment was performed

entities.name: SANDY ACID SOIL
entities.description: The specific soil type of the experimental plots in Niger

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The quantity of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: RETURNS TO INVESTMENT
entities.description: The economic gain relative to the cost of investment in the production system

entities.name: PRODUCTION COST
entities.description: The total expenditure required for vegetable production, including labor

entities.name: RETURNS ON LABOR
entities.description: The economic return generated per unit of labor invested

entities.name: RETURNS ON LAND
entities.description: The economic return generated per square meter of land

entities.name: RETURNS ON WATER
entities.description: The economic return generated per cubic meter of water used

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The long-term goal of transforming agricultural practices for economic and environmental viability
